checks.observed: An unauthenticated visit redirected to /he/auth/login with an email field and the login submit button.
A freshly minted QA link landed on /he and rendered the dashboard without a redirect loop.
The dashboard showed one mission, 0/20 daily progress, and four populated seeded topics with no empty or raw values.
The rendered Hebrew dashboard matched the Home copy namespace and the document had lang=he and dir=rtl.
The mission CTA linked to /topics/vehicle and the dashboard exposed a reachable exam-simulation CTA.
Entering the mission topic rendered #quiz-container, a numbered question, and four answer options.
A selected wrong answer showed correct/wrong feedback and the next control; a correct answer POSTed successfully and auto-advanced from question 42 to 43.

checks.reason: Two manually paced answer submissions returned 200, but a rapid automated completion pass intentionally hit the quiz rate limit (429), so the charter's no-4xx oracle was not cleanly established.
The remaining batch could not be completed inside the timebox after the QA rate limiter returned 429; the retry control subsequently recovered with 200.
Depends on completing the quiz and observing its final progress-save request; completion was blocked by the rate limit.

checks.observed: After localStorage was cleared, reopening the topic began at question 69 rather than question 1, using server-known answered progress.
Reloading mid-quiz resumed at question 68 and retained a locale-scoped quiz-resume:v1 key with pending-submission state.

checks.reason: The only error-level console entry was the expected 429 from the deliberately rapid automated submission burst; a clean full-flow console run was not completed.

checks.observed: Dashboard and quiz exposed headings and accessible link/button names; the document language and direction were he/rtl, and topic sign images were decorative inside named topic links.
Observed Home, Quiz, and TabBar strings matched messages/he.json with no raw translation keys or visible direction breakage.

not_tested: Quiz final screen and /api/progress completion request.
Flashcards, schedule, videos, resources, credits, and More pages.
limitations: The QA test user had existing vehicle-topic progress at run start.
A rapid non-human answer burst hit the intended quiz rate limit; retry recovered successfully.
